creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please note: to make the emulators/virtualbox-ose port link correctly on
amd64, the binutils-2.17 branch should be updated to r217488 or later.

I also found an issue with the www/qt4-webkit port, where it uses PLT
relocations incorrectly on amd64, causing link errors like "relocation
R_X86_64_PC32 against symbol `cti_vm_throw'".  This is WebKit PR 28422:

https://bugs.webkit.org/show_bug.cgi?id=28422

However, the patch there only tests for Linux, so I had to amend it to
include FreeBSD.  See the attached diff for the www/qt4-webkit port.

This may also be needed for other webkit ports, I will try webkit-gtk2
next...
